blended.narrative: Tuckerman Ravine is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 28 inches possible over the next 14 days. Strong winds with gusts to 43 mph may cause lift holds. Mild temps with highs near 44°F.
